parsed_itinerary.title: Departure & Arrival in New York City

details.from_city_to_airport: Taxi from New Delhi city center to Indira Gandhi International Airport — 45 min, ₹900
details.arrival_transfer: Private car from JFK Airport to hotel — 30 min, $100
activities: Check-in at The St. Regis New York and freshen up
Explore Central Park for an evening stroll
Dinner at Astoria Restaurant, known for its luxurious ambiance and fine dining experience
Visit the Metropolitan Museum of Art — entry $25
Lunch at The Modern, a Michelin-starred restaurant in MoMA — approx. $75
Afternoon shopping at Fifth Avenue — luxury boutiques
Return to hotel to relax
Dinner at Le Bernardin, a renowned French seafood restaurant — approx. $150
details.shopping_or_convenience_stop: Stop by Starbucks for a coffee during the day — approx. $5

activities: Morning visit to the Statue of Liberty and Ellis Island — ferry ticket $23
Lunch at a trendy spot in the Financial District — approx. $50
Afternoon visit to One World Observatory — entry $38
Dinner at Nobu, experiencing Japanese cuisine — approx. $200
details.shopping_or_convenience_stop: Convenience stop at Duane Reade for snacks — approx. $10

activities: Visit to the American Museum of Natural History — entry $23
Lunch at Shake Shack for a casual bite — approx. $20
Afternoon visit to Broadway for a show (ticket approx. $150)
Dinner at The Rainbow Room — approx. $120
Last-minute shopping in SoHo
Lunch at Balthazar, a classic French bistro — approx. $70
Return to hotel to check-out
Private car transfer to JFK Airport — 30 min, $100
